findings.title: Source and manifest scope sets are in parity.
findings.message: Every normalized literal scope found in source is declared, and every declaration was found.
findings.remediation: Keep this comparison in CI so later scope changes produce a reviewable diff.

findings.title: Declared public and redirect hosts share the authorized-domain contract.
findings.message: No objective host mismatch was found in the secret-free manifest.
findings.remediation: Confirm domain ownership in Google Search Console before submission.

findings.title: A declared scope is absent from the demonstration storyboard.
findings.message: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.readonly has no recording step that demonstrates the corresponding feature.
findings.remediation: Add a shot that begins at a reproducible route and visibly exercises the feature using this scope.
